indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: absence of storage space
indicators.rationale: No cabinets or shelves are visible, which would be necessary for storing ingredients and cookware.

indicators.name: absence of lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no visible artificial lighting, which is essential for visibility during cooking.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, no hard prep surfaces, no storage space, and no lighting, making it impossible to perform any cooking activities.
